body.u: At nineteen I will leave school and join the {junior?} Army which will last for two years. In the army I will join the Intelligence corps, when I leave the {jounier?} army and join the regular army in the Intelligence corps, this will be for three years. At the age of twentyonetwenty-one I will leave the army and join the police force. I will start basic training and have two years on the beat after this I will at twenty three I will join the C.I.D. as a sargentsergeant and by the time I am thirty, thirtyfivethirty-five I will be an police inspector by this time I would be married and got children and I will remain in the police force until I retire at 65 year of age.
